content: Şimdi localStorage tabanlı kalıcı çözümü uyguluyorum:

args.Description:
"Implemented localStorage-based approval persistence. Once a user approves a token for a spender with MaxUint256, that token+spender combo is saved to localStorage. The needsApproval check now also consults localStorage, meaning approval state survives pag
<truncated 172 bytes>
args.Instruction: "Add localStorage approval persistence and fix loading state check in needsApproval."
